training_status: powerlifting background, currently focusing on muscle building

benefits.description: ~100 pounds lost in ~10 months on Mounjaro (11/22-10/23), 280→180 lbs. Later lost additional weight to 145 lbs (3/24).

side_effects.description: Lost a LOT of muscle during rapid weight loss phase
Lost enough hair that part widened about half an inch
Developed loose skin (not extensive but noticeable)

protocol_notes: Previous protocol: Mounjaro (brand tirzepatide) 11/22-10/23. Dose progression: 2.5mg for ~6 months, 5mg for extended period, 7.5mg for ~1 month only. Took 6-month break from tirzepatide after reaching lowest weight of 145 lbs. Currently restarted on 5mg Tirzepatide weekly + 1mg Retatrutide weekly with focus on slow approach and muscle building. Goal weight ~150 lbs. Regretted rapid weight loss phase due to muscle loss and loose skin.
